note: DETERMINISTIC research-entry rules for the Speculative Research Portfolio. v2 aligns the research book with the UNIFIED TRUST LADDER (lib/trust-tiers): it bets the SAME sealed forecast the other books do, differentiated ONLY by trust. It acts on CORE_BUY copies (the confirmed tier, nested) + the exploration/creative SPECULATIVE tier + experimental combos. Two v1 mistakes are corrected: (1) the 20% uncertaintyHaircut is REMOVED — it silently negated every speculative edge and left the book at $0 while pretending to test speculation; (2) the separate systemCentral-based UNCONFIRMED_CANDIDATE and directional-intel evaluations are RETIRED — the forecast's creative tier already incorporates that evidence, so betting it separately (against the wrong, core probability) was the 'separate sources' problem. Origins-not-voices is untouched: the creative tier is v7's frozen computation, consumed verbatim, so a single-origin rumour still moves it by ~zero. NEVER edit this file to change behaviour after positions exist — create research-profile-v3.json instead, so results stay separable by rulesetVersion. These are EXPERIMENTAL research sizing rules; they do NOT touch the frozen production sizing/thresholds.

priceTooHigh.note: researchMaximumEntryPrice = min(gates.maxMarketPrice, productionMaximumAcceptablePrice + priceToleranceCents/100). Applies to a speculative-tier candidate: it funds only if observedAsk <= researchMaximumEntryPrice AND the post-haircut edge at the effective entry price is >= gates.minEstEdge. Otherwise OBSERVED_NO_ENTRY.

unconfirmedCandidates.note: v1's systemCentral-based UNCONFIRMED_CANDIDATE stream is retired; priced-out exploration candidates are now valued at the correct creative tier by the exploration-shadow pass.

directionalWatch.note: v1's separate directional-intel WATCH stream is retired; the forecast's creative tier already incorporates the intel evidence.

experimentalCombos.note: Funds ONLY on a real, fresh audit.pricing.liveQuote (quoteTs CURRENT) for a structurally-acceptable non-BUY combo. Never fairPrice/maxBuyPrice/reconstructed/later/fallback prices. No usable live quote -> OBSERVED_NO_ENTRY.

sizing.note: Percent of CURRENT research bankroll. CORE_BUY preserves the frozen production tier fraction (3/4/5%) verbatim; it never re-derives frozen sizing. On consolidation the highest eligible category stake percentage is used.

caps.note: Fractions of the research bankroll. No martingale, no loss-recovery stake increase, no retroactive stake change, no borrowing or negative cash.

feeBasis.note: Inside contracts.withinVerifiedEnvelope (KXUFCFIGHT, YES, taker, single fill, price 0.59-0.89, size 3.28-823.81 contracts, as of 2026-07-16) the fee is VERIFIED and exact. Outside it the same 0.07 ceil formula is used but stamped ESTIMATED_OUT_OF_SCOPE with the envelope-failure reasons stored, and a pessimistic-fee sensitivity P&L is computed. An entry whose fee cannot be produced by the model at all (tradingFee returns null) is OBSERVED_NO_ENTRY.
